quality.effect_clarity: Clear description of area of effect and target benefits/penalties.

effects.targets: Creatures of caster's choice within area
effects.benefit: Shed dim light (5ft radius), Advantage on all saving throws.

effects.penalty: Disadvantage on attack rolls against affected creatures.

effects.trigger: Fiend or Undead hits an affected creature with a melee attack
effects.effect: Attacker must make a Constitution saving throw or be [blinded] until the spell ends.

mechanics.action_economy: Standard action economy for an 8th-level spell (1 action, Concentration).
mechanics.balance_assessment: Very powerful effect for an 8th-level spell, particularly the area advantage on saves and the strong offensive countermeasure against Fiends/Undead. The high material component cost helps balance its power.
